category_sources: Official Tor GitLab project is under anti-censorship/pluggable-transports/meek: https://gitlab.torproject.org/tpo/anti-censorship/pluggable-transports/meek.
source_facts.description says "Blocking-resistant pluggable transport for Tor".
display_name_sources: Official Tor GitLab repository path and project name are meek.
docs_sources: Official Tor Browser Manual circumvention page documents meek transports for users.

repo_sources: Official Tor GitLab project page exists at https://gitlab.torproject.org/tpo/anti-censorship/pluggable-transports/meek.
tags_sources: Official Tor project path places meek under anti-censorship pluggable transports.
source_facts.description and executables identify Tor pluggable transport client/server tools.
